changeSet.author: ro.bekmukhamedov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_users ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY, first_name varchar(255) NOT NULL, last_name varchar(255), phone varchar(15), tg_user_id varchar(50) NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: ro.bekmukhamedov
ro.bekmukhamedov
changeSet.comment: Created user_customer_link table (relation between customers and users).

changeSet.author: ro.bekmukhamedov
changeSet.comment: Created address table (tabular part of customer addresses).

changeSet.author: ro.bekmukhamedov
ro.bekmukhamedov
changeSet.comment: Created customer_external_id table (external GUID of customer in supplier accounting system).

changeSet.author: ro.bekmukhamedov
changeSet.comment: Created price_list table (price lists from suppliers).
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS price_list ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY, supplier_id uuid NOT NULL, customer_id uuid, start_date timestamp NOT NULL, end_date timestamp, is_active boolean NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES supplier(id), FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customer(id) );

changeSet.author: ro.bekmukhamedov
ro.bekmukhamedov
changeSet.comment: Created system_orders table (client orders to supplier).
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_orders ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY, customer_id uuid NOT NULL, supplier_id uuid NOT NULL, address_id uuid NOT NULL, user_id uuid NOT NULL, datetime timestamp NOT NULL, number varchar(100), status boolean DEFAULT FALSE, FOREIGN KEY (customer_id) REFERENCES customer(id), FOREIGN KEY (supplier_id) REFERENCES supplier(id), FOREIGN KEY (address_id) REFERENCES address(id), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES system_users(id) );

changeSet.author: ro.bekmukhamedov
changeSet.comment: Created order_item table (items in the order).
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS order_item ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY, order_id uuid NOT NULL, nomenclature_id uuid NOT NULL, count integer NOT NULL, price float NOT NULL, sum float NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES system_orders(id), FOREIGN KEY (nomenclature_id) REFERENCES nomenclature(id) );
